# userData

**Instance Property**

A mutable dictionary to store arbitrary key-value pairs associated with a camera item.

## Declaration

```swift
var userData: NSMutableDictionary? { get }
```

## Discussion

View objects can bind to this object to store “house-keeping” information.
title: userData
